title: Exclude Dirt Holes from Notes
notes: Dirt holes are no longer included on Drill Log PDF Notes pages.
A Dirt condition by itself no longer creates a notes entry or extra notes page.
Dirt holes remain visible on the Drill Log pages and remain counted on the summary for field context.
Manually entered notes on non-dirt holes and other condition notes continue to export normally.
Cross-page GPS arranging, loaded-hole summary rules, edge-anchored GPS arrows, compact callouts, and Quick Fill targeting fixes remain included.
